facts.v: $35.00 — fijado por DeMolay International; incluye la membresía vitalicia prepaga y el Patent
$20.00 — el Chapter puede fijar montos mayores enmendando sus Bylaws
El Scribe lo remite vía eScribe dentro de los 10 días de conferido el Initiatory Degree
1 de enero al 31 de diciembre
Firma del Treasurer o Master Councilor + contrafirma de un miembro del Advisory Council, con autorización previa en reunión regular
Prohibido usar efectivo para pagos del Chapter
Cuenta separada e intocable; pagarlos no requiere voto del Chapter
Prohibidos — única excepción: el PMC's Jewel aprobado por el Advisory Council
Requiere permiso previo del Executive Officer de la Jurisdiction
En eScribe, de inmediato y nunca más de 10 días después de la iniciación
Antes del 30 de noviembre de cada año (Continuing Advisor Certification en eScribe)
3 meses más allá del deadline = suspensión temporal automática del Chapter; 3 meses de suspensión por falta de pago = el Charter puede anularse

facts.k: Certificado de seguro para un evento
facts.v: Solicitarlo online con mínimo 15 días hábiles de anticipación (30 días si pide additionally insured)
Notificación al Executive Officer dentro de las 24 horas, con reporte escrito
3 ausencias consecutivas sin excusa aprobada = vacancia automática del cargo
Presentada en stated meeting al menos 1 semana antes de votarse (salvo autorización del EO)
Dentro de los 10 días posteriores a la instalación del Master Councilor
Pasado el 12.º cumpleaños y antes del 21.º; a los 21 se pasa a Senior DeMolay
Mínimo 2 registered Advisors, SIEMPRE (Two-Deep Leadership)
2 Advisors hasta 10 jóvenes; +1 adulto por cada 5 jóvenes adicionales
Mínimo 5 Advisors (DeMolay International); base mínima de 3 Master Masons en good standing
Al menos 2 Advisors por cada 5 miembros activos presentes
Un Chapter nuevo opera bajo Letters Temporary hasta tener al menos 15 Members
Mínimo 3 por categoría (cívicas, sociales, deportivas, fundraising) + todos los Obligatory Days
Mínimo 3 integrantes; el primero nombrado es el chairman; solo el Membership Committee es obligatorio
0-1 black cubes = electo · 2 = queda en suspenso (lie over) · 3 o más = rechazado

$35.00 — set by DeMolay International; includes prepaid lifetime membership and the Patent
$20.00 — Chapters may set higher amounts by amending their Bylaws
The Scribe remits it via eScribe within 10 days of the Initiatory Degree being conferred
January 1 to December 31
Signed by the Treasurer or Master Councilor + countersigned by an Advisory Council member, with prior authorization at a regular meeting
Using cash for Chapter payments is prohibited
Separate, untouchable account; paying them requires no Chapter vote
Prohibited — sole exception: the PMC's Jewel approved by the Advisory Council
Requires prior permission from the Jurisdiction's Executive Officer
In eScribe, immediately and never more than 10 days after initiation
By November 30 each year (Continuing Advisor Certification in eScribe)
3 months past the deadline = automatic temporary suspension; 3 months suspended for non-payment = the Charter may be voided
Request online at least 15 business days ahead (30 days for additionally-insured requests)
Notify the Executive Officer within 24 hours, with a written report
3 consecutive unexcused absences = automatic vacancy of the office
Presented at a stated meeting at least 1 week before being voted on (unless the EO authorizes otherwise)
Within 10 days of the Master Councilor's installation
Past the 12th birthday and not yet 21; at 21 you become a Senior DeMolay
Minimum 2 registered Advisors, ALWAYS (Two-Deep Leadership)
2 Advisors for up to 10 youth; +1 adult for every 5 additional youth
Minimum 5 Advisors (DeMolay International); core minimum of 3 Master Masons in good standing
At least 2 Advisors for every 5 active members present
A new Chapter operates under Letters Temporary until it has at least 15 Members
Minimum 3 per category (civic, social, athletic, fundraising) + every Obligatory Day
Minimum 3 members; the first named is chairman; only the Membership Committee is mandatory
0-1 black cubes = elected · 2 = lies over · 3 or more = rejected
